summary.zh: 本版带来会话节点重试与独立分叉、OpenCode Zen 供应商，以及角色创建技能；并收紧 Auto 审核边界、拆开稳定/测试版更新通道。Windows 安装包原生资源与沙箱已修通，工具执行与审批失败更可靠。微信 Bridge 状态、技能插入不丢正文、提及菜单与若干历史 issue 修复也一并合入。
summary.en: This release adds per-node retry and independent session fork, an OpenCode Zen provider, and a character-creator skill. Auto review is limited to boundary actions, and stable vs beta update trains are separated. Packaged Windows native/sandbox resources are restored, and tool execution plus reviewer failures are more reliable. WeChat Bridge status, skill insertion that keeps composer text, mention-menu polish, and a batch of deferred issue fixes are included.

title.zh: 任意节点可重试与独立分叉
title.en: Retry any node or fork an independent session

summary.zh: 稳定的用户消息与已完成 Agent 节点都可重试，或分出互不影响的独立会话。
summary.en: Stable user messages and completed Agent nodes can retry, or fork into an independent session.

sources.title: feat: add node retry and independent session fork

title.zh: 新增 OpenCode Zen 供应商

summary.zh: 设置里可接入 OpenCode Zen；完整端点 URL 不再重复拼协议，连通探测仅在 2xx 时通过。
summary.en: OpenCode Zen is available in provider setup; complete endpoint URLs keep a single protocol suffix, and only 2xx probes succeed.

sources.title: feat: add OpenCode Zen provider and harden endpoint handling

summary.zh: 技能目录新增角色创建技能，首次同步会带上。
summary.en: A character-creator skill is added to the bundled catalog and synced on first run.

title.zh: Auto 只自动审核边界动作

summary.zh: 常规受控动作直接执行；审核通道失败会分类、可恢复时重试，并失败即停。
summary.en: Contained routine actions run directly; reviewer transport failures are classified, retried when recoverable, and fail closed.

sources.title: fix(permission): isolate Auto review to boundary actions (#2177)

title.zh: 稳定版与测试版更新通道分离
title.en: Separate stable and beta update trains

summary.zh: 预发布版本只推进测试通道；稳定通道需显式提升。
summary.en: Automatic prereleases advance beta only; stable promotion requires an explicit override.

sources.title: fix(updater): separate stable and beta trains (#2186)

title.zh: 修复 Windows 安装包沙箱与原生资源
title.en: Restore packaged Windows sandbox and native resources

summary.zh: 打包后的命令执行、子代理与沙箱 Git 等可从明确安装路径找到原生与字体资源。
summary.en: Packaged commands, subagents, and sandboxed Git resolve native and font resources from explicit install roots.

sources.title: fix(packaging): make native runtime resources self-contained

title.zh: 恢复可靠的工具执行结果

summary.zh: 被拒绝或失败的工具调用会明确失败，不再被当成成功；部分禁网一次性命令不再误走 Auto 审核。
summary.en: Rejected or failed tool calls stay explicit failures, and some network-blocked one-shot commands no longer auto-review in Auto mode.

title.zh: 合入积压 issue 修复

summary.zh: 覆盖 OTA 启动提示、飞书投递错误、Gemini 生图、不可用模型会话恢复，以及分支感知记忆等。
summary.en: Covers OTA boot notices, Feishu delivery errors, Gemini image generation, unavailable-model session restore, and branch-aware memory.

title.zh: 选择技能时保留输入正文
title.en: Keep composer text when selecting skills

summary.zh: 选择技能只替换斜杠触发段，或插入到当前选区，不再清空整个输入框。
summary.en: Selecting a skill replaces only the slash trigger or inserts at the selection, instead of clearing the composer.

sources.title: fix(composer): preserve text when selecting skills (#2170)

title.zh: 微信 Bridge 连接状态对齐

summary.zh: 授权后短暂陈旧状态会继续对齐，直到微信已连接或到达终态。
summary.en: A brief stale status after authorization keeps reconciling until WeChat connects or reaches a terminal state.

title.zh: 创建会话前先等待 Agent 就绪
title.en: Wait for agent runtime before session creation

summary.zh: 新建或恢复会话会先等待所属 Agent 运行时；激活失败则中止，避免半成品会话。
summary.en: New and restored sessions wait for the owning Agent runtime, and abort without partial state when activation fails.

sources.title: fix: wait for agent runtime before session creation

title.zh: 输入框与编辑器体验打磨

summary.zh: 提及菜单隐藏原始会话 ID；分叉操作图标更新；块选高亮贴合实际渲染行。
summary.en: Mention menus hide raw session IDs, the fork action uses the new glyph, and block highlights follow rendered line bounds.

sources.title: fix: replace the session fork action icon
fix(editor): align block highlights to rendered lines
